name: Grounded Body Bar Detoxifying Charcoal & Peppermint 150g
description: 100% natural bathing bars for body and hair. Choose our original calming lavender, or our new activated charcoal mint, and uplifting aloe eucalyptus. Dry brush your body before a relaxing shower with which is a great exfoliator. The firm but gentle sisal bristles reveal healthier, smoother, and more radiant skin, after a session of dry brushing. Detoxifying – with charcoal bamboo and peppermint essential oil. Grounded only uses ingredients safe for humans and the environment. We do not use nasty chemicals commonly found in conventional cleaning products: Carcinogens Hormone Disruptors Synthetic Fragrances Artificial Dyes Palm Oil Parabens Phthalates Sulfates Ingredients: Saponified Coconut, Canola, Macadamia, Castor Oils; Bamboo Charcoal, Menthol Crystals, Peppermint Essential Oil.
